name: Louisiana Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl combine the onions, celery, bell peppers, butter, and seasonings. Mix well.
2. Place the roast in a large roasting pan, fat side up.
3. With a large knife, make 6 to 12 deep slits in the meat down to about 1/2 inch from the bottom. Do not cut all the way through.
4. Fill each pocket with the vegetable mixture, reserving about 1 tablespoon of vegetables to rub over the top of the roast.
5. Bake uncovered at 300°F until a meat thermometer reads about 160°F for medium doneness (about 3 hours). For rare roast, cook until thermometer reads 140°F.
6. Serve immediately and topped with some pan drippings if desired.
